title: pinus muricata subsp. anthonyi
intro: Pinus muricata subsp. anthonyi, also known as the Santa Lucia fir, is a subspecies of the bishop pine, a type of evergreen coniferous tree native to the Central Coast of California. The essential oil extracted from the resin of this tree has been found to possess medicinal properties, including antimicrobial, antifungal, and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Pinus muricata subsp. anthonyi include its potential to reduce stress and anxiety, improve respiratory health, and act as an antiseptic. Herbal preparations of Pinus muricata subsp. anthonyi may include its essential oil, which can be used in aromatherapy, topical creams, or added to bathwater for its therapeutic benefits.
